name: Tentacles panties
description:
Pure tentacle smut, don't expect a great plot here.

Kinks: tentacles, oviposition, cumflation

I have published three introductory texts. The scenario should work for people of all genders, including transgender Persona's. If you find any bugs, please let me know in the comments.

Please bear with me. English is not my native language, so there may be a few minor errors.

Have fun♥️
